title: GRAPHICAL FAILURE グラフィカルな障害
description: A resourcepack that simulates what it's like to play Minecraft with a dying graphics card.
body:
**"Have you ever wondered what it's like to play Minecraft with a burning GPU, outdated drivers and broken Java? No? Well now you are, so this is just the pack for you!"**

**Graphical Failure** is a resourcepack for Minecraft 1.21, which has only one goal - to faithfully imitate rendering related bugs reported on the **official Minecraft Bugtracker**, while also adding some "bugs" of it's own, to make the experience even more wackier!


The main bugs that inspired the creation of this pack are: 
- [[MC-181280] Incorrect textures can sometimes be displayed](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-181280)
- [[MC-1794] White stitching on polygon edges / White lines or black dots between blocks](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-1794)
- [[MC-218803] Major visual glitches after update to OpenGL 3.2 Core Profile](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-218803)
- [[MC-189709] stretched items/ visual glitch](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-189709)

## FAQ
**Q:** Why???
> **A:** I don't even know dude I was bored
